Know What You Eat.

How It Works

Three Steps to
Better Nutrition

Nourish your body, fuel your life — one smart choice at a time.

Step 01

Snap Your Meal

Open Fuel, tap the camera, and snap a photo of your food. Our AI identifies every item on your plate — no manual searching required.

Step 02

AI Analyzes Instantly

Fuel breaks down calories, protein, carbs, fat, and micronutrients in seconds — calibrated against 600+ foods in our USDA-backed database.

Step 03

Uncover Gaps

See your eating patterns over days and weeks. Fuel reveals vitamins, minerals, and nutrients you're consistently missing — not just macros.

Features

Everything You Need to
Eat Smarter

Snap & Track

Point your camera at any meal and Fuel instantly identifies every food item, estimates portions, and logs calories, macros, fiber, sugar, and sodium — all in under 3 seconds.

TodayMon, Mar 3
1,240of 2,100
Protein85g
Carbs120g
Fat45g
860 remaining

AI Chat Nutritionist

Got questions about your diet? Chat with Fuel's AI nutritionist 24/7. Ask about meal suggestions, nutrient timing, food swaps — it knows your history and personalizes every answer.

How can I help with your nutrition today?

I'm low on protein today. What should I eat?

Based on your log, try grilled chicken (31g protein) or Greek yogurt (17g). Both would hit your 120g target!

Ask anything...

Search or Scan Barcodes

Don't have a photo? Type any food and Fuel's RAG-powered search finds it instantly from 600+ items with fuzzy matching. Or scan a barcode for packaged foods — exact data, zero effort.

Search
grilled chicken
Grilled Chicken Breast
165 kcalhigh
Chicken Caesar Salad
320 kcalmedium
Chicken Rice Bowl
480 kcalhigh

About Fuel

Uncover Nutritional
Gaps In Your Diet

Most calorie trackers stop at counting. They log what you eat, but they don't tell you what your body is missing. Fuel goes further — analyzing your meals to uncover deficiencies in fiber, sugar, sodium, and other key nutrients your diet may be lacking.

Every analysis includes confidence levels, serving assumptions, and health insights — so you know exactly how reliable the data is. It's not just about tracking — it's about optimizing what you eat.

600+
USDA-Calibrated Foods
<3s
Photo Analysis
24/7
AI Nutritionist Chat
RAG
On-Device Search

Get Started

Start Tracking Smarter

Snap a photo, get instant AI analysis, and finally understand what your body needs — not just what you ate.
